name: Potato and Bacon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9 x 13-inch glass baking dish.
3. Cook bacon and onion until the bacon is crisp. Drain well.
4. Combine eggs with potatoes and cheese. Mix in the cooked bacon.
5. Pour evenly into the baking dish.
6. Bake for about 45 minutes, or until the center is set.
7. Serves 6 to 8.
